blended.narrative: Whistler Blackcomb is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 4,297 ft. Looking ahead, 25 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 46°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 5" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 6" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 5" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 44°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
